name: ADC Energy Storage System (facility BESS + rack-tier supercaps)
source_documents: products/ESS/ESS-BOD-001_Rev0_2.md (Rev 0.2, 2026-06-11, governing Markdown — issued for review; coupling axis subject to decision 0007)
telemetry_domain: D1 power island (BMS/PCS via Modbus TCP, IEC 61850 input to RELAY-PROTO) + safety-instrumented ESS domain with first-responder read-only view (ESS-BOD-001 §6.6)

parameters.value: 6 MW PCS / 3 MWh usable (30 min), power-oriented; 5 MW coherent step x 1.20
LFP only; NMC 811 rejected; NiZn tracked as no-thermal-runaway alternative (P-2)
OPEN — MGN-BOD-002 locks AC-coupled 4.16 kV grid-forming [L]; ESS-BOD-001 classifies DC-coupled 800 V-class (forward-looking; equipment not generally available)
Outdoor containerized, dedicated yard, FM DS 5-33 preference #1; unoccupiable; no interior battery rooms
>=2 independent battery/PCS groups (split 2x3 MW vs 3x2 MW open, ESS-OI-01)
EDLC supercapacitors only; hybrid (Li-ion-containing) supercap devices prohibited (SC-1)
G-1..G-7 per NFPA 855 (2026); LSFT report (UL 9540A 5th Ed. / CSA C800:25) is a BID requirement (PS-2); propagation assumed between containers absent installation-level result (SEP-1)
No integrated water suppression (managed burn-down ERP, D-06); clean agent excluded from BESS envelope (FP-1, D-07); EI-1 + EI-2 early intervention both implemented (D-08)
CE-1/CE-2 hard interlocks: IT + house + recharge <= dispatch ceiling; recharge sheds first
ESS-RFQ-001 Rev 0.1 HELD from bidders — §1.1/Package 2 hard-code DC coupling; Attachment A site data sheet unfilled (first instance: Trappey's)
